title: Why is my listing under validation?
bodyHtml:
When you create a new product, it is systematically sent in validation if it meets specific criteria. 

This process consists in checking that the product you are selling complies with our quality standards, that it doesn't already exist in our catalog, and that it meets all requirements to be validated. 

As long as your product is not validated, your listing won't be published online. You can find these listings in the section 'Offers > In validation':




 

If your listings have been pending validation for more than 48 hours, and before contacting our team, please check the following elements: 

 

➡️ Your product is approved for sale at Back Market. Please make sure that:

 

  • Your product is an electronic device and fits the Back Market DNA: it is not a spare part, accessory or health device. If it is a product bundle, it must be authentic and sold by the brand as well.
    💡 For more details, you can check this article: The different products available for sale on Back Market.


 

 

  • It is impossible to fully guarantee product reliability (e.g. health products)
  • The product prevents the customer from benefiting from a "like new" experience due to incompatibility issues related to older operating systems
  • The product has too many specificities or defaults and generate too many returns (e.g. some hardware, LG products)
  • The product’s current market price (delivery included) is higher than the selling price. For example, video games prior to 2015 are not accepted. 

➡️ Your product has been created correctly. Check that : 

  • The product pictures comply with our quality standards. The photos have a white background, and look professional. No accessories not provided with the device and no advertising or brand name is visible on the picture. 


 

  • All mandatory fields specific to the product and your listing have been filled in correctly: Stock higher than 0, delivery mode set, no contradictory attributes on the product page, etc.
  • The price new of your product: this must be based on the value of the device. It is your responsibility to fill it in each time you create a product. If your selling price is higher than the price new, your listing will not be validated. 

⚠️ We remind you that if the stock of the listing is equal to 0, the product will not be validated by our team. 

The validation process can take up to 48 hours. If it's still not validated after this period, and you've checked all elements listed above, please contact us through the dedicated contact form.

💡 You can also check if the products is blocklisted in this article: The different products available for sale on Back Market.
